subcodes.first_line: O Riḍá! Hearken unto My call, for verily it maketh mention of thee with that which shall draw thee nigh unto God, the Mighty, the All-Praised. Blessed is the servant who hath turned and attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا رضا اسمع ندائی انه یذکرک بما یقربک الی الله العزیز الحمید طوبی لعبد اقبل و فاز
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God
